name: ghost-allocator
description: Modern ETF-based portfolio builder by GrayGhost Labs – a post-60/40 allocator for normal humans.

scripts.test:ghostflow: tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/scoring.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/volatilityRegime.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/etfNetIssuance.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/activeIndexFlow.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/indexConcentration.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/passiveShareProxy.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/marketBreadth.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/systematicFlowProxy.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/systematicFlowDisplay.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/leveredEtfRebalanceDisplay.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/cftcTffHistory.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/leveredEtfRebalanceHistory.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/leveredEtfRebalancePressure.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/retirementFlowPressureProxy.test.ts && tsx lib/ghostflow/__tests__/artifactFreshness.test.ts
scripts.verify:reference-clean: npm run check:no-reference-data && npm run check:no-reference-history && npm run check:parity-names
scripts.ghostflow:check: npm run ghostflow:validate-artifacts && npm run test:ghostflow
scripts.verify:ghostregime: npm run build && npm run lint && npx tsx lib/ghostregime/__tests__/persistGate.test.ts && npx tsx lib/ghostregime/__tests__/diagnostics.test.ts && npx tsx lib/ghostregime/__tests__/stooqResponse.test.ts && npx tsx lib/ghostregime/__tests__/asofUrl.test.ts && npx tsx lib/ghostregime/__tests__/marketstackEod.test.ts && npx tsx lib/ghostregime/__tests__/flipWatchPressure.test.ts && npx tsx lib/ghostregime/__tests__/serveMetadata.test.ts
